name: compact-pip-resize
title: Compact PiP and resize scheduling
description: Make the single mounted Ambient Fish surface usable in compact Document PiP and coalesce ResizeObserver projection updates per frame.
scope: apps/web compact PiP composition, resize projection scheduling, focused tests, and responsive QA

notes: First implementation child. Keep canonical game coordinates and the single-mounted-surface PiP model unchanged.
